query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contratos WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@test.com' OR email LIKE '%@teste.com' OR email LIKE '%@exemplo.com')) as contratos_teste,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comissoes WHERE usuarioId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@test.com' OR email LIKE '%@teste.com' OR email LIKE '%@exemplo.com')) as comissoes_teste,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agendamentos WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@test.com' OR email LIKE '%@teste.com' OR email LIKE '%@exemplo.com')) as agendamentos_teste;
